_comment: Field map for FNMA Form 1004C — Manufactured Home Appraisal Report.
_comment2: NOTE: 1004C shares all residential section tabs with 1004. The manufactured_home_comments field is the only 1004C-specific addition.
_calibration: HOW TO CALIBRATE: 1) Open ACI with a 1004C report loaded. 2) Start desktop_agent/agent.py. 3) Run: python desktop_agent/calibrate_aci.py — copy automation_id and class_name/class_index values from the output. 4) POST http://localhost:5180/reload-maps to apply. 5) Run: python _test_aci_live.py 1004c to verify.
_migrationStatus: LEGACY_TRANSITIONAL — canonical source is server/fieldRegistry.js. Do not extend this file; add new fields to fieldRegistry.js first.

_schema.label: Human-readable field label (used for label-match fallback)
_schema.automation_id: UIA AutomationId — MOST RELIABLE. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_name: Windows class name for RichEdit controls (e.g. 'RichEdit20W'). Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.class_index: 0-based index among controls of this class_name. Fill in from /calibrate output.
_schema.control_index: 0-based index among ALL text-input controls. Fill in from /calibrate output as fallback.

neighborhood_description.label: Neighborhood Description
neighborhood_description.notes: Neighborhood section — TX32 addendum editor. Tab: Neig. Shared with 1004.

site_comments.label: Site Description
site_comments.notes: Site section — TX32 addendum editor. Tab: Site. Shared with 1004.

improvements_condition.label: Improvements
improvements_condition.notes: Improvements section — TX32 addendum editor. Tab: Impro. Shared with 1004.

manufactured_home_comments.label: Manufactured Housing Comments
manufactured_home_comments.notes: 1004C-specific field. HUD labels, foundation certification, chassis/tow-hitch, marketability. Likely in Improvements tab — confirm during calibration.

sales_comparison_commentary.label: Sales Comparison Analysis
sales_comparison_commentary.notes: Sales comparison section — TX32 addendum editor. Tab: Sales. Shared with 1004.

reconciliation.label: Reconciliation
reconciliation.notes: Reconciliation section — TX32 addendum editor. Tab: Reco. HIGH PRIORITY. Shared with 1004.

market_conditions.label: Market Conditions
market_conditions.notes: Market conditions — in Neighborhood section. Tab: Neig. Shared with 1004.
